title: Torch's Dark Aesthestics - Modded
description: A dark mode resource pack addon that is designed to give a simple and more visible feel to modded GUIs.
body:
# Torch's Dark Aesthetics - Modded
A complementary resource pack to [Torch's Dark Aesthetics](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/torchsdarkaesthetics) that also applies the same dark mode aesthetic to a list of mods. More mods will be added as time goes on. Eventually, just like the vanilla version, I plan to make "[Color] Aesthetic" versions of this pack as well, to also match the vanilla [Color] Aesthetic versions.

### Mod Support
<details>
<summary>Supported Mods</summary>

| Mod | Resource Pack Version |
|----:|:--------------------|
| [Accesories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories) | >= v0.1.0 |
| Apothic Mods <details> <summary>Mods</summary> [Apothic Attributes (AttributesLib)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes), [Apothic Enchanting](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-enchanting), and [Apothic Spawners](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-spawners) </details> | >= v0.1.0 |
| [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) <details> <summary>Addons</summary> [Applied Energistics 2 Wireless Terminals](https://modrinth.com/mod/applied-energistics-2-wireless-terminals) </details> | >= v0.2.0 |
| [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) | >= v0.2.0 |
| [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked) | >= v0.2.0 |
| [Crafting Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-tweaks) | >= v0.2.0 |
| [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)/[Curios API Continuation](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios-continuation) | >= v0.1.0 |
| [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) | >= v0.1.0 |
| [Expanded Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-storage) | >= v0.1.0 |
| [Hostile Neural Networks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hostile-neural-networks) | >= v0.1.0 |
| [Iron Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-chests) | >= v0.2.0 |
| [Iron Furnaces](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-furnaces) | >= v0.1.0 |
| [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) | >= v0.1.0 |
| [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) <details> <summary>Addons</summary> [Just Enough Mekanism Multiblocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-mekanism-multiblocks) </details>| >= v0.1.0 |
| [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) <details><summary>Addons</summary> [Mekanism Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-additions), [Mekanism Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-generators), [Mekanism Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-tools) </details> | >= v0.1.0 |
| [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph) | >= v0.2.0 |
| [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) | >= v0.1.0 |
| [Sophisticated Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core) <details> <summary>Mods</summary> [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks), [Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage) </details>| >= v0.2.0 |
| [TrashSlot](https://modrinth.com/mod/trashslot) | >= v0.2.0 |
| [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) | >= v0.1.0 |
| [VanitySlots](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity) | >= v0.2.0 |
| [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) | >= v0.2.0 |

</details>

If you want to request for a mod to be added, you can do so by opening a [new issue](https://gitlab.com/TorchTheDragon/torchsdarkaesthetics/-/issues/new?issuable_template=Mod%20Support), but I would highly recommend you first check to see if either the mod is already supported, if someone else has already requested for it to be added, or if the request is already in one of my lists of mods to add. Check the [main issues page](https://gitlab.com/TorchTheDragon/torchsdarkaesthetics/-/issues) to see the lists.
<!--Template for Addons
<details><summary>Addons</summary> MOD </details>
-->

## Important Information
The translucent textures in this resource pack on MC Version 1.21.1 or below will not work without a mod like [Neo TranslucencyFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/neo-translucencyfix) or [TranslucencyFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/translucencyfix). 
Also, this is just a pack that contains ALL the available textures for every mod in the supported list, if you want a more specific approach, I am working on a basic website to allow you to pick specific mods to go into the pack. Here is the link to the generator: [https://torchthedragon.pythonanywhere.com](https://torchthedragon.pythonanywhere.com)

## Recommended Mods
- **[Neo TranslucencyFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/neo-translucencyfix)**: Makes translucent textures ACTUALLY translucent. (not needed if on version 1.21.2 or above)
- **[TranslucencyFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/translucencyfix)**: Makes translucent textures ACTUALLY translucent. (needed if on any version 1.20.1 or below)
- **[Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised) Mod**: Moves the hotbar so it doesn't crop the texture.
